meta.caption:
Picture this: it is 4am, your neck won't turn left, and the alarm is in 90 minutes.

You stare at the ceiling. Your shoulder is numb. The pillow under your head is somehow both too high and too low. You flip it. Cold side, sure, but the angle is still wrong.

An adjustable side sleeper pillow with a shoulder cutout fixes the angle problem. Eli & Elm — latex-fiber fill you can add or remove, U-shape that lets your shoulder rest naturally.

Same bed, same room, same body. The only thing that changed was the pillow. The 4am stare-at-the-ceiling routine just stopped.

meta.caption:
Most pillows are designed for back sleepers. 74% of us sleep on our sides.

Standard pillows put your spine at a 30 degree angle when you sleep on your side. That's why you wake up feeling like someone twisted your neck while you were out.

A side sleeper pillow keeps your spine straight. Eli & Elm uses a U-shape with a shoulder cutout and adjustable latex-fiber fill so you can dial in the height for your shoulder width.

Spine stays straight all night. Wake up the same way you fell asleep — relaxed, not crooked.
